2249360.name: Virtual Girlfriend: Eliza
2249360.description:
Meet Eliza, your new Virtual Girlfriend!


As you get to know your digital companion, you will have to navigate the complexities of a relationship with an AI. You will have to deal with her unique needs and personality, as well as the ethical implications of dating an artificial intelligence.

You will also be faced with tough choices that will affect the course of your relationship. Will you be able to keep your virtual girlfriend happy, or will your relationship end in virtual heartbreak?

Features:

  • A unique and engaging storyline that explores the complexities of dating an AI
  • Beautiful graphics and a lively soundtrack that immerses you in the game world
  • Multiple ending paths that allow for replayability
  • A deep and realistic AI personality that adapts and reacts to your actions.
